_publications._publicationTitle: Discovery of a small molecule targeting IRA2 deletion in budding yeast and neurofibromin loss in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: STS26T had a significant fraction of viable cells even at the highest dose tested (10 μM), indicating a minimum 3-fold selectivity
details: STS26T had a significant fraction of viable cells even at 10 μM UC1, indicating minimum 3-fold selectivity for NF1-deficient cells
